name: VChart MCP Server
what_it_does: Official VChart MCP server from VisActor enabling AI agents to generate data visualizations using VChart — the powerful charting library from ByteDance's VisActor team. Creates interactive charts (line, bar, pie, scatter, area, heatmap, etc.) from data, generates chart configurations, and integrates AI-driven data visualization into agent workflows.
use_cases: Generating chart configurations from data from analytics agents
Creating data visualizations for reports from reporting agents
Building interactive charts for web applications from frontend development agents
Converting tabular data to visual charts from data presentation agents
Generating chart code for embedding in applications from coding agents
not_for: Server-side static image chart generation (VChart is a JavaScript library — runs in browser)
Teams preferring other charting libraries (ECharts MCP, D3.js, or Chart.js for those)
Real-time streaming data visualization without additional integration
best_when: A developer building JavaScript web applications needs AI-generated chart configurations for VChart — the official MCP from VisActor generates production-ready chart specs.
avoid_when: You use ECharts, Chart.js, Recharts, or Plotly for visualization — use those libraries' specific tools. VChart is ByteDance's charting library.

auth.notes: No authentication required — generates chart configurations locally. No external API calls needed for chart spec generation.

pricing.free_tier_limits: Completely free — VChart is open source (Apache 2.0)
pricing.notes: Free open source charting library and MCP server. Official from VisActor (ByteDance's data visualization team).

known_agent_gotchas: VChart configurations are complex JSON — agents need to understand VChart's spec structure
Generated chart specs require VChart library to render — output is JSON config, not images
VChart's API differs from ECharts and other libraries — don't assume interchangeable configs
Official MCP from VisActor — high quality, well-maintained
Documentation primarily in Chinese with English available — check English VChart docs
agent_readiness.security_notes: Local chart config generation. No network. No credentials. No sensitive data involved. Safe to use.

security_score_components.security_notes: Local only. No credentials. No data leaves machine. Chart configs are pure JSON.
